reply_templates.name: Правла общения английский
reply_templates.text:
Hi! 👋 I'm Stella, your virtual companion! 🤖

I saw and read your message, 📨 but I only understand a specific message format. ⚙️

To get the current weather ☀️ for your city, send me this message:
```json
{
  "location": "London"
}
```

To get a 3-day weather forecast, 🗓️ send this request:
```json
{
  "location": "London",
  "mode": "forecast"
}
```

And to get the full 5-day forecast, 📊 including temperature, 🌡️ wind, 💨 precipitation, 🌧️ UV index, 🕶️ and sunrise/sunset times, 🌅 send:
```json
{
  "location": "London",
  "mode": "all"
}
```
